meaning: n.阿尔玛(f.) n.(埃及的)歌女,舞女
examples: At Princeton, alumni parade through the town wearing their class uniforms and singing their alma mater.
He represents Cambridge University, the alma mater, where Edward King and John Milton had been students.
Gadaffi picked up victims at his former alma mater, Tripoli University, where he gave lectures and then led the young women to a nearby room .
Student-founded alumni groups play a very important role in recruiting students to attend their alma maters.
In fact, many of such business school alumni donate generously to their alma mater.
